message:
Guard agent-driver tests with module-level availability detection (bd-1p9y)

Replace per-test shell/tmux availability checks with module-level
detection so describe.skipIf() can skip entire test suites cleanly
in environments where /bin/sh or tmux is unavailable.

acp-driver.test.ts:
- Detect /bin/sh and workspace availability at module level
- Use describe.skipIf(!shellAvailable) for spawn, checkpointing,
  and conversation pruning suites
- Remove all per-test "if (!shellAvailable) return" guards
- Use real /tmp workspace instead of /tmp/test-workspace
- Remove redundant inline comments that restated the obvious

tmux-driver.test.ts:
- Detect tmux availability at module level via Bun.spawn
- Use describe.skipIf(!tmuxAvailable) for integration suites
- Remove beforeAll availability check and per-test guards

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
